docket_entries.description: LAW & MOTION / DISCOVERY, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE APRIL-01-2025 HEARING RE: DEFENDANT ALLISON WARREN'S MOTION FOR EXTENSION OF TIME TO FILE ANSWER; THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. QUINN; CLERK: V. DA FONSECA; NOT REPORTED. (302/JMQ)

calendar.matters:
Motion For Extension Of Time To File Answer
Off Calendar Apr-01-2025 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT ALLISON WARREN's Motion For Extension Of Time To File Answer.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Off calendar. This motion lacks a filed proof of service and is untimely under CCP 1005. Movant also failed to provide courtesy copies, as required by SF Local Rule 2.7B.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/JMQ)
